name: Claude Code Sandbox
postCreateCommand:
cat >> ~/.zshrc << 'ALIASES'
alias a="claude --allow-dangerously-skip-permissions --dangerously-skip-permissions"

# Git aliases
alias gd='git status && git -P diff'
alias gs='git pull && git push && git -P log -n 3'
alias ga='git status && git -P diff && git add -A && git status'
gac() { git status && git -P diff && git add -A && git status && git commit -m "$*" && git pull && git push; }

# Utilities
d() { if [ $# -gt 0 ]; then du -sh $@; else du -sh *; fi }

# Screen sessions
PROJECT_DIR="/workspace/internal/athena"
alias t='[ -n "$STY" ] && cd $PROJECT_DIR || (screen -d t &>/dev/null; screen -r t &>/dev/null || (cd $PROJECT_DIR && screen -S t))'
alias s='[ -n "$STY" ] && cd $PROJECT_DIR || (screen -d s &>/dev/null; screen -r s &>/dev/null || (cd $PROJECT_DIR && screen -S s))'
ALIASES
